subject: Rockruff, a small dog-like Pokemon with a rocky collar, sitting in a sunny grassy meadow
description: A small, puppy-like creature sits in a sun-drenched grassy meadow. The creature has a compact round body, large expressive blue eyes, beige-tan fur with darker brown markings, perked ears with darker tips, and a distinctive collar of small jagged rocks around its neck. A small white flower appears near its paw. The background is warm yellow-green, with soft grass and diffuse sunlight suggesting a pleasant outdoor setting. The mood is cheerful and gentle.
foreground: small dog-like creature with rocky collar sitting in grass, one paw near a small flower
background: sunny grassy meadow with warm yellow-green tones
emotion: alert curiosity, wide-eyed and open expression
